violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Need thermometer in reach-in-cooler
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Microwave and Reach-in-cooler need cleaned of food debris.

General premises. — --Items unnecessary for the operation and maintenance of the food establishment were being stored on the premises. Tools in boxes under 3-comp sink and extra door for broken cooler need to be stored elsewhere or in different compartment.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
